title: Get Britain Working: Labour Market Insights October 2025
body: "This report contains statistics on:    Universal Credit customer employment by sector   Universal Credit customer journeys, including flows between conditionality regimes   the into-work rate, including breakdowns by geography and Universal Credit customer characteristics   local labour markets, including economic inactivity and employment rates, into-work rates and payrolled employment    We have also published data tables in open document spreadsheet (ODS) format and a background information and methodology report.  Pre-release access   In addition to staff who are responsible for the production and quality assurance of the statistics, up to 24-hour pre-release access is provided to ministers and other officials. We publish the job titles and organisations of the people who have been granted up to 24-hour pre-release access.  Feedback  We are seeking feedback from users on this release of labour market insights. Email labour.marketstatistics@dwp.gov.uk with your comments.  "
